title: Irish Biscuit Crust Cheesecake
description: A dessert made with an Irish biscuit crust topped with a creamy cheesecake, finished with a crispy Oreo topping.
instructions: Prepare the crust by crushing the Irish biscuits in a food processor until fine crumbs form.
Mix the crushed biscuits with melted butter until well combined.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Prepare the cheesecake by beating the cream cheese until smooth.
Add the sugar and beat until combined.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, followed by the vanilla extract.
Pour the cheesecake batter into the prepared pan over the crust.
Bake the cheesecake for 45-50 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let the cheesecake cool completely in the pan.
Prepare the topping by crushing the Oreos in a food processor until fine crumbs form.
Mix the crushed Oreos with melted butter until well combined.
Sprinkle the Oreo topping over the cooled cheesecake.
Bake the Oreo topping in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 5-7 minutes or until golden brown.
